testcase.name: SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › P-HOME renders with hero card and start button
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › AC1+AC2+AC3: Tap 全部开始 → POST /sessions → navigate P07
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › AC4: P07 完整渲染 - Hero + 3 stat + progress + slots + CTA
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › AC4: P07 slot groups render correctly
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › AC2: POST /sessions request body is correct
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › P07 error state: POST /sessions fails → toast
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › P07 back navigation returns to P-HOME
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › ADV-1: Rapid double-click "全部开始" should not fire POST twice
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › ADV-2: P07 with missing sid param still renders gracefully
SC-01-T09 · P-HOME → P07 跳转 + P07 完整渲染 › ADV-3: P-HOME CTA disabled when total=0
